description:
2023 Lamborghini Urus S, 4.0L TC V8, 4WD, 657 bhp, 8 Speed Automatic. AED 1,029,000 or AED 16,121 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 17,797 KM's - Lamborghini Warranty Valid Until June 2027 or 150,000 KM's - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Giallo Inti Metallic - Seat Belts In Giallo Taurus - Hight Gloss Black Exterior Accents - Carbon Fiber Kick Plates - Carbon Fiber Interior Package - Full PPF - Bang & Olufsen 3D Surround Audio - Keyless Entry - Keyless Start - Heads Up Display - Adaptive Cruise Control - Heated & Ventilated Seats - Massage Seats - Apple CarPlay - Soft Close Doors - Electronically Adjustable Seats incl. Memory Function - Selectable Drive Modes - Panoramic Sunroof - Alcantara Roof Lining - Multi-Functional Steering Wheel
